entities.name: Strategic Partner
entities.context: Reviews all sessions from the week, synthesizes across multiple dialogues, identifies patterns in thinking

entities.name: Reflection Synthesizer
entities.context: Reviews accumulated decision memos, synthesizes insights across memos, tracks action item completion

entities.name: Topics-to-Revisit
entities.context: Primary input source for review, updates status, closes resolved items, adds new items

entities.name: Personal Intelligence
entities.context: Triggers weekly deep update, cross-session pattern analysis, style effectiveness learning, honest assessment refinement

entities.name: weekly-strategic-review
entities.context: Scheduled task that runs every Saturday at 12:00 PM ET for strategic review

relationships.context: Strategic Partner reviews sessions as part of the weekly strategic review workflow
